name: automationforge
description: AutomationForge command center + PEEEZ user intake (dual Netlify sites)

scripts.deploy:admin: npm run build:admin && netlify deploy --prod --dir=sites/admin --functions=netlify/functions --message admin-command-center
scripts.deploy:intake: npm run build:intake && netlify deploy --prod --dir=sites/intake --functions=netlify/functions --message user-intake
